name: Linguine with Herbed Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 1 pound large shrimp, peeled and deveined
1/3 cup freshly grated imported Parmesan cheese
1/4 cup finely chopped fresh oregano, thyme, basil, and parsley
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Add the linguine or spaghetti and cook for 8 or 9 minutes, until al dente. Drain.
2. In a large skillet, heat the butter and olive oil over medium heat. Add the shrimp and garlic. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the shrimp turn opaque and pink, about 3-4 minutes on each side.
3. Combine the cooked pasta with the shrimp mixture in the skillet. Stir in the Parmesan cheese, chopped herbs, salt, and pepper to taste.
4. Adjust seasoning as needed. Serve hot. This dish can be made ahead of time and reheated when ready to serve.
